description:
Adds password protection before disabling NVDA's Screen Curtain or exiting NVDA while
Screen Curtain is active.
changelog: Initial version with Screen Curtain password settings and exit protection.

translations.description:
Adds password protection before disabling NVDA's Screen Curtain or exiting NVDA while
Screen Curtain is active.
translations.changelog: Initial version with Screen Curtain password settings and exit protection.

translations.description: 在停用 NVDA 的螢幕簾幕，或在螢幕簾幕作用中結束 NVDA 之前，加入密碼保護。
translations.changelog: 初始版本，提供螢幕簾幕密碼設定與結束保護功能。
